description: This one truly checks all the boxes. Located in the heart of Mosquito Creek, this fully turnkey 3 level townhome offers 3 bedrooms and 2.5 baths, including a generous primary with ensuite and walk in closet. The main level features new warm laminate flooring, powder room, and a West Coast inspired renovated kitchen professionally designed with intention down to the details. The dining area opens directly to a spacious private fenced patio with room for al fresco dining, bbqing, and lounging. The living room features a cozy gas fireplace and a large light filled window. The lower level includes a flexible rec room (4th bedrooms) storage, and direct parkade access with 2 parking stalls. Convenient walkable location with easy move in ready living and a true neighbourhood feel.
